text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo and I are visiting town again.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I feel like it's still too early to go home.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's a store near here fit for my royal taste.
Shall we take a look?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I won't ask you to buy me anything.
We'll just browse.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So come on! Hehe, I wonder if any new bags are
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, a call from Sky. I wonder what it could
be...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What awful timing...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky and I were assigned to harvest the fields. It
completely slipped my mind and I ended up
walking around with you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was so excited to go to that store, but those
carrots need to be picked...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You want to come harvest carrots? You certainly
have some odd interests. But sure, I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There you are. Oh, even your trainer came.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?
choice_data_list:
She was just about to go to a store she likes
when you called.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's fine, I just completely forgot about harvest duty... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, get it together! If you don't snap out of it, I
might actually have to put in effort...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you know some way to get King fired up?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, "make harvesting fun"?
choice_data_list: The person who picks the biggest carrot wins!
The person who picks the biggest carrot wins!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that could be fun. I bet you're fired up to win,
huh, King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'd fall for such a childish trick.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But fine, let's get this over with quickly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I got the biggest, most first-rate carrot
ever!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nice one, King! That's awesome!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whew! I'm so happy that worked.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Even my harvest is first-rate! Ohohoho!
choice_data_list: It's not over yet! I'm not going to lose!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Even my harvest is first-rate! Ohohoho!
choice_data_list: It's not over yet! I'm not going to lose!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-who said I was having fun?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm just releasing the stress of not being able to
go to the store!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, King, you're so adorable.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't ignore what I just said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo, Seiun Sky, and I end up
having a great time with the carrot harvest.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I'd expect no less of my trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right! As long as you don't give up, you
always have a chance of winning!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I'm afraid I'll be the one digging up the
biggest carrot in the end!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Look, those carrots over there
are looking real plump!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're right! We might set a new record! And it's
mine for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You totally got this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is just between us, but you really know how
to handle King, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo, Seiun Sky, and I end up
having a great time with the carrot harvest.
